specific_question: What percentage of MediConn's clinician worktime is dedicated to interacting with and diagnosing patients during virtual consultations as per the Q3 2025 internal analysis?
answer: 40% of clinician worktime per visit is spent on direct patient interaction and diagnosis.
justification: This metric reflects the proportion of clinician time devoted to productive activities. Improving it is vital for driving operational efficiency.
dr_question: How can MediConn streamline its IT workflows in Q4 2025 to boost clinician efficiency and manage per-consultation costs, given that virtual healthcare expansion has improved access but increased overall expenses?
